folio.label: 102v
folio.l: Be dayes feele , than at hire mariage
¢ Thus witú hire fader , for a certeyn space
Dwelletú this flour , of wyfly pacience
That neither by hire wordes , ne hire face
Byforn~ the folk , ne eke in here absence
Ne shewed she , that hire was don offence
Ne of hire heye estate , no remembraunce
Ne had she , as by hire countenaunce
¢ No wonder is , for in hire gret estate
Hire goost was euäe , in pleyn humylite
No tendre moutú , nonö hert delicate
No pompe , no semblaunt of ryalte
But ful of pacient benygnyte
Discrete , and prydles , ay honåable
And to hire husbond , ay meke and stable
¢ Men speken of Iob , and most for his humblesse
As clerkis whan he~ list , konne wel endite
Namely of men , but as in sotúfastnesse
Thougú Clerkis preyse wo~men , but a lite
There can noman , in humblesse hi~ a quyte
¢ As women konne , ne konne be half so trewe
As wommen ben , but it be falle of newe
¢ Fro Boloigne , is this Erl of Pauyk come
Of whicú the fame , vp sprongö to more and lesse
And in the peeples Eres , alle and some
Was coutú eke , that a newe markysesse
He witú hi~ brougút , in swicú pompe & richesse
That neuäe was there seyn , witú ma~nes eye
So noble aray , in al west lumbardye
¢ The Markys , whicú that shope , & knew al this
Er that this Erl was w w come , sent his message
For thilke sely , poore Grisildis
And she witú humble hert , and glad visage
Nat witú no swollen thougút , in hire corage
Cam at his heste , and oon hire knees hire sette
And reuerently , and wysly she hi~ grette
¢ Grisilde q¶ he , my wyl is outerly
This mayden , that shal wedded be to me
Resceyued be to morwe , as ryally
As yt possible is , in myn hous to be
And eke that euäy wygút , in his degree
Haue his estate , in syttyngö and in seruyse
And hey plesaunce , as I can best deuyse
¢ I haue no wo~man , sufficient certeyn
The chaumbres to araye , in ordinaunce
